ddls:
CREATE TABLE "houses" (
  "house_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "house_type" TEXT /* Type of house (e.g., apartment, single-family home) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the household (e.g., city, state, country) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the household */,
  "house_size" INTEGER /* Size of the house in square footage */,
  "number_of_occupants" INTEGER /* Number of occupants in the household */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the house was built */,
  "energy_efficiency_rating" REAL /* Initial energy efficiency rating of the house */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_production_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy production system */,
  "system_type" TEXT /* Type of energy production system (e.g., solar, wind) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy production system */,
  "system_capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the energy production system (in kW) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Maintenance schedule (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "system_status" TEXT /* Status of the system (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption record */,
  "house_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household consuming energy */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of energy consumption */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of energy consumption */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature during the month */,
  "daylight" REAL /* Average daylight hours during the month */,
  "energy_consumed" REAL /* Total energy consumed by the household */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "hour_of_day" INTEGER /* Hour of the day (0-23) */,
  "peak_hour_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if it's a peak hour */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_house_id FOREIGN KEY ("house_id") REFERENCES houses ("house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy production record */,
  "house_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household producing energy */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of energy production */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of energy production */,
  "energy_produced" REAL /* Total energy produced by the household */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "hour_of_day" INTEGER /* Hour of the day (0-23) */,
  "peak_hour_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if it's a peak hour */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_production_house_id FOREIGN KEY ("house_id") REFERENCES houses ("house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, daylight) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "house_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household making the reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor making the reading */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Time of the reading */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "hour_of_day" INTEGER /* Hour of the day (0-23) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_house_id FOREIGN KEY ("house_id") REFERENCES houses ("house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_efficiency" (
  "efficiency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy efficiency record */,
  "house_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household being rated */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of energy efficiency rating */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of energy efficiency rating */,
  "efficiency_rating" REAL /* Energy efficiency rating (e.g., 0-100) */,
  "energy_saving" REAL /* Percentage of energy saved compared to the previous month */,
  "improvement_tips" TEXT /* Improvement tips for better energy efficiency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("efficiency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_efficiency_house_id FOREIGN KEY ("house_id") REFERENCES houses ("house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "house_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household receiving the recommendation */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Energy-saving recommendation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the recommendation */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the recommendation (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "estimated_savings" REAL /* Estimated energy savings in kWh */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_house_id FOREIGN KEY ("house_id") REFERENCES houses ("house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "house_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household receiving the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., energy consumption, energy production) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Resolution status of the alert (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_house_id FOREIGN KEY ("house_id") REFERENCES houses ("house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical energy consumption record */,
  "house_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household consuming energy */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of historical energy consumption */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of historical energy consumption */,
  "energy_consumed" REAL /* Total energy consumed by the household */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "hour_of_day" INTEGER /* Hour of the day (0-23) */,
  "peak_hour_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if it's a peak hour */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_history_house_id FOREIGN KEY ("house_id") REFERENCES houses ("house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_production_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical energy production record */,
  "house_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household producing energy */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of historical energy production */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of historical energy production */,
  "energy_produced" REAL /* Total energy produced by the household */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "hour_of_day" INTEGER /* Hour of the day (0-23) */,
  "peak_hour_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if it's a peak hour */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_production_history_house_id FOREIGN KEY ("house_id") REFERENCES houses ("house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., homeowner, administrator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household setting */,
  "house_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household with the setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., temperature threshold) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "setting_status" TEXT /* Status of the setting (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_settings_house_id FOREIGN KEY ("house_id") REFERENCES houses ("house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification preference */,
  "house_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household with the preference */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference (e.g., email notifications) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference (e.g., true, false) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated time */,
  "notification_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of notifications (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_preferences_house_id FOREIGN KEY ("house_id") REFERENCES houses ("house_id")
)
